{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Heart Like a Churning Sea
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Heart Like a Churning Sea]] is a play/work by [[Tedric]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
